problem id: 06667a93
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND SHL(7)) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00101000 -> 00010100
  01100110 -> 00110011
  01111111 -> 10111111
  11111001 -> 01111100
  00011001 -> 00001100
  10001001 -> 01000100
  11101110 -> 01110111
  01010100 -> 00101010
  11001010 -> 01100101

query: 01000111
predicted answer: 10100011
